## beehiiv subscriptions delete

Delete a subscription by ID

### Synopsis

Delete subscription

This cannot be undone. All data associated with the subscription will also be deleted. We recommend unsubscribing when possible instead of deleting. If a premium subscription is deleted they will no longer be billed. Deletes a subscription.

API path: /publications/{publicationId}/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}

```
beehiiv subscriptions delete <subscriptionId> [flags]
```

### Examples

```
beehiiv subscriptions delete sub_123
beehiiv subscriptions remove sub_123
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help                help for delete
      --query stringArray   Add a repeatable query parameter in key=value form
```
